name: ObsidianVaultMemory
description: Synchronous retrieval plugin for immediate Obsidian vault search. It reads markdown notes, returns matching snippets, and never edits vault content.
author: VCPstudio

OBSIDIAN_VAULT_DIR.description: Absolute path to the primary Obsidian vault.

OBSIDIAN_ALLOWED_VAULTS.description: Optional semicolon-separated absolute vault roots. The primary vault is always allowed.

OBSIDIAN_SEARCH_LIMIT.description: Default maximum number of search results.

OBSIDIAN_MAX_FILE_SIZE.description: Maximum markdown file size to search, in bytes.

invocationCommands.description:
Search markdown notes in the configured Obsidian vault and return ranked snippets.
Parameters:
- command: SearchNotes
- query: text to search for.
- maxResults: optional integer.
Example:
<<<[TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
tool_name:「始」ObsidianVaultMemory「末」
command:「始」SearchNotes「末」
query:「始」project architecture「末」
maxResults:「始」5「末」
<<<[END_TOOL_REQUEST]>>>

Find notes that link to a target note name or path.
Parameters:
- command: GetBacklinks
- target: note title, relative path, or wiki-link target.

List recently modified markdown notes in the configured vault.
Parameters:
- command: ListRecentNotes
- maxResults: optional integer.
